title: BILL_EXECUTION_PACKET_RULES
mission: Execute only after packet is complete.
objective: Prevent bill-payment mule work without letting Aeyes improvise financial, legal, accounting, or entity-classification decisions.
task: Before bill execution, verify packet completeness and apply the hard DO NOT and REQUIRED RECEIPT rules.
rules: Do not change autopay without explicit Ben approval.
Do not pay from wrong entity account.
Do not classify 1954 Castleway as 100% business without allocation.
Do not classify shared software as 100% business without proration.
Do not mark paid without receipt.
If blocked, return blocker, not silence.
